item.title: College Student Helps Solve 'Missing Girl's' Cold Case
item.description: A factual overview of how a college student contributed to solving a “missing girl” cold case, highlighting their research and the case developments.

media:content.media:title: College Student Helps Solve 'Missing Girl's' Cold Case
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of how a college student contributed to solving a “missing girl” cold case, highlighting their research and the case developments.

item.title: Affair At Scuba Diving School Leads To An Investigation
item.description: An incident at a scuba diving school prompts an investigation, examining the events and responses in a factual and responsible way.

media:content.media:title: Affair At Scuba Diving School Leads To An Investigation
media:content.media:description: An incident at a scuba diving school prompts an investigation, examining the events and responses in a factual and responsible way.

item.title: He Tried To Claim His Innocence!
item.description: A man asserts his innocence in a criminal case, with the facts of his claim and the legal process examined in a factual and respectful way.

media:content.media:title: He Tried To Claim His Innocence!
media:content.media:description: A man asserts his innocence in a criminal case, with the facts of his claim and the legal process examined in a factual and respectful way.

item.title: Search Ended For Missing Brendan Thomas Santo
item.description: The search for Brendan Thomas Santo concludes, with a factual account of the efforts made and the outcome, presented respectfully and clearly.

media:content.media:title: Search Ended For Missing Brendan Thomas Santo
media:content.media:description: The search for Brendan Thomas Santo concludes, with a factual account of the efforts made and the outcome, presented respectfully and clearly.

item.title: The 1996 Olympics attack that shocked the world
item.description: A factual overview of the terrorist bombing at the 1996 Summer Olympics in Atlanta’s Centennial Olympic Park, where a pipe bomb killed one spectator, injured over 100 people, and led to a long investigation that eventually identified Eric Robert Rudolph as the perpetrator.

media:content.media:title: The 1996 Olympics attack that shocked the world
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the terrorist bombing at the 1996 Summer Olympics in Atlanta’s Centennial Olympic Park, where a pipe bomb killed one spectator, injured over 100 people, and led to a long investigation that eventually identified Eric Robert Rudolph as the perpetrator.
